name: 17p11_2_Potocki_Lupski_duplication
description: Potocki-Lupski syndrome (PTLS) — reciprocal duplication of the 17p11.2 Smith-Magenis region (~3.7 Mb), mediated by NAHR between flanking SMS-REP SD blocks (proximal, middle, distal SMS-REPs) at >98% identity. Phenotype: mild-to-moderate ID, autism, hypotonia, failure to thrive, cardiovascular anomalies. Reciprocal of Smith-Magenis (deletion).

architecture.internal_structure: Three SMS-REP SD blocks of ~200-250 kb at >98% identity (KER cluster paralogs); unique core contains RAI1 (primary dosage gene; LoF=SMS, gain=PTLS), TNFRSF13B, DRC3, MYO15A, SREBF1, RASD1, FLCN.
